description: PayPal v6 SDK presentation mode configuration for payment flows

v6_pattern.popup_handling: Advanced popup blocker handling with graceful degradation

auto.description: Automatically selects the best presentation mode

behavior.desktop: Tries popup first, falls back to modal if blocked
behavior.mobile: Adapts to device capabilities and screen size
behavior.popup_blocked: Automatically falls back to modal or redirect

popup.description: Opens PayPal in a popup window

behavior.mobile: May open in popup or redirect depending on browser
behavior.popup_blocked: Throws error if popup is blocked

modal.description: Opens PayPal in an overlay modal

behavior.desktop: Overlay modal on top of current page

modal.warning: Not recommended for desktop web due to cookie limitations

auto_mode_fallback.logic: Auto mode tries popup → modal → redirect based on browser capabilities

popup_blocked_fallback.manual: Catch popup errors and retry with modal/redirect

popup_blocked_error.user_message: Popup was blocked. Please allow popups for this site and try again.
popup_blocked_error.manual_handling: Catch error and retry with different mode

browser_incompatible.description: Browser doesn't support requested presentation mode
browser_incompatible.user_message: Your browser doesn't support this payment method. Trying alternative...
browser_incompatible.fallback: Use auto mode or redirect mode

modal_restrictions.description: Modal mode affected by cookie restrictions
modal_restrictions.user_message: Please try again or use a different payment method.

best_practices: Test across different browsers and devices
Provide clear user messaging for presentation mode issues
Configure return URLs when using redirect mode
Consider mobile vs desktop user experience
Implement fallback strategies for older browsers
Test presentation modes with different screen sizes
Monitor analytics for presentation mode success rates
Avoid 'modal' mode for desktop web applications
testing_recommendations: Test auto mode across all target browsers
Test mobile experience on actual devices
Test with different screen sizes and orientations
Test with browser extensions that block popups
